acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
paragraphs: By accessing or using {{appName}} (the "Service") operated by {{operatorName}} ("we", "us", or "our"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, you may not use the Service.
These Terms constitute a legally binding agreement between you and the Operator. You must be at least 16 years old to create an account or use the Service.

serviceDescription.title: 2. Description of Service
paragraphs: {{appName}} is a web-based ticketing platform that enables theaters and event organizers to list performances and allows users to browse, book, and receive tickets for those events.

We act as a technology platform and agent for the theater or event organizer (the "Venue"). The contract for attendance is formed between you and the Venue; we facilitate the transaction on their behalf.
We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue the Service (or any part thereof) at any time with reasonable notice.

account.title: 3. Account Registration and Security
paragraphs: To make a booking you must register for an account by providing accurate and complete information. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials.
You agree to notify us immediately if you suspect any unauthorized use of your account. We are not liable for losses arising from your failure to protect your credentials.
We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms or are inactive for an extended period.

bookings.title: 4. Bookings and Tickets
paragraphs: All bookings are subject to seat availability at the time of purchase. A booking is confirmed only when you receive a booking confirmation email with your ticket or QR code.
Tickets may be issued as PDF documents and/or QR codes. Where QR codes are used, each QR code is unique to the booking and must not be copied or shared.

Tickets are personal and non-transferable unless the Venue expressly permits transfer. The Venue has the right to refuse admission if a ticket is presented by someone other than the registered booker, at the Venue's discretion.
We are not responsible for tickets lost or inaccessible due to incorrect email addresses provided at registration.

cancellations.title: 5. Cancellations and Refunds
paragraphs: Cancellation and refund policies are set by the Venue and communicated at the time of booking. We apply these policies on behalf of the Venue.
If a performance is cancelled or substantially changed by the Venue, affected ticket holders will be notified and refunds will be processed in accordance with the Venue's policy.
For free bookings, cancellations can be made through your account up to the Venue's stated deadline. Please cancel promptly if you cannot attend, to free up seats for other guests.
We reserve the right to cancel bookings that appear fraudulent, duplicated, or in violation of these Terms.

conduct.title: 6. Prohibited Conduct
paragraphs: When using the Service you agree not to:
Provide false, misleading, or fraudulent information during registration or booking.
Use automated tools (bots, scrapers) to access the Service or to acquire tickets in bulk.
Resell or transfer tickets for commercial gain without the Venue's prior written consent.
Attempt to circumvent access controls, interfere with the Service's infrastructure, or introduce malicious code.
Harass, threaten, or abuse other users or Venue staff.
Violate any applicable law or regulation.
Breach of these provisions may result in immediate account suspension and, where appropriate, referral to law enforcement.

intellectualProperty.title: 7. Intellectual Property
paragraphs: All content, design, software, and trademarks on the Service are the property of {{operatorName}} or its licensors and are protected by applicable intellectual property laws.
You are granted a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to access and use the Service for personal, non-commercial purposes only.
You may not reproduce, distribute, modify, or create derivative works from any content on the Service without our prior written permission.

warranties.title: 8. Disclaimer of Warranties
paragraphs: The Service is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, express or implied, including but not limited to merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement.

We do not warrant that the Service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or free from viruses or other harmful components. We are not responsible for the quality, safety, or legality of events listed on the platform.

liability.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
paragraphs: To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, {{operatorName}} and its affiliates, employees, and agents shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of or inability to use the Service.
Our total aggregate liability to you for direct damages shall not exceed the amount you paid for the booking that is the subject of the claim, or €50, whichever is greater.
Nothing in these Terms limits liability for death or personal injury caused by negligence, fraud, or any other liability that cannot be excluded by law.

indemnification.title: 10. Indemnification
paragraphs: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless {{operatorName}} and its affiliates, officers, employees, and agents from any claims, damages, losses, or expenses (including reasonable legal fees) arising from your use of the Service, your breach of these Terms, or your violation of any third-party rights.

governingLaw.title: 11. Governing Law and Jurisdiction
paragraphs: These Terms are governed by the laws of Italy, without regard to conflict of law principles. Any dispute arising from or relating to these Terms or the Service shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Italy.
If you are a consumer resident in the European Union, you may also benefit from mandatory consumer protection provisions of the law of your country of residence.
The European Commission provides an online dispute resolution platform at https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr/ which you may use to resolve disputes.

changes.title: 12. Changes to Terms
paragraphs: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. When we make material changes, we will notify you via email or a prominent notice on the Service at least 15 days before the changes take effect.
Your continued use of the Service after the effective date of revised Terms constitutes your acceptance. If you do not accept the new Terms, you must stop using the Service.

contact.title: 13. Contact Us
paragraphs: For any questions or concerns regarding these Terms, please contact us:
